title: Database Partitioning Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on different database partitioning patterns and concepts.

questions.question: What is 'Horizontal Partitioning' also known as?
Which of these is a way to divide a single table into smaller, more manageable pieces?
Which partitioning method divides data based on a mathematical calculation on a specific column?
What is a major benefit of database partitioning?
options: Better query performance for large tables
Ability to scale individual partitions across multiple disks
